battleTraits.name: Delusions and Madness
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.effect: First battle round: pick a DELUSION. Otherwise, roll D6. On 1-3, pick a different DELUSION than last time. On 4+, you must pick the same DELUSION as last time. For the rest of the battle round, you believe the DELUSION you picked.

battleTraits.name: Delusion of the Great Feast
battleTraits.timing: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
battleTraits.declare: If you believe this DELUSION, pick each friendly unit on the battlefield to be the targets.
battleTraits.effect: Heal (1) each target. If the target is a SERFS unit, return D3 slain models to it instead.

battleTraits.name: Delusion of the Knightly Host
battleTraits.effect: While you believe this DELUSION, if the unmodified charge roll for a friendly HERO or KNIGHTS unit is 8+, add 1 to hit rolls for that unit’s combat attacks for the rest of the turn.

enhancements.name: Almost Lucid
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the 'Delusions and Madness' ability
enhancements.effect: You can re-roll the delusion roll.

enhancements.name: Companion of the Hunt
enhancements.effect: If your general is not in combat, they can move 3". They cannot move into combat during any part of that move.

enhancements.name: A Worthy Challenge
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick an enemy unit that started the battle with 3 or fewer models and is in combat with your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: Your opponent must decide whether the target will accept or refuse your general’s challenge. If they accept, for the rest of the phase, when your general and the target are picked to use a FIGHT ability, all of their attacks must target each other. If they refuse, the target has STRIKE-LAST for the rest of the phase.

enhancements.name: Choirmaster
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 6" of your general to be the target.
enhancements.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of friendly units’ ranged weapons for attacks that target that enemy unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Delusion of the Sentinel
regimentAbilities.effect: While you believe this DELUSION, add 1 to ward rolls for friendly units while each model in the unit is contesting an objective.

regimentAbilities.name: Delusion of the Hunter
regimentAbilities.effect: While you believe this DELUSION, add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units while no models in the unit are contesting an objective.

abilities.name: Sound the Pursuit!
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, until the start of your next turn, when making charge rolls for the target, add 1 to the number of dice rolled, to a maximum of 3, then remove 1 dice of your choice and use the remaining dice as the charge roll.

abilities.name: Lie of the Land
abilities.effect: If this unit is not in combat and is wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge, remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 6" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Holy Blades of Bone
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit.

abilities.name: Unholy Chorus
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 10" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, subtract an amount from the target’s control score equal to the number of damage points allocated to the target this phase by this unit’s shooting attacks.
